SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class ColumnDefBuilder<S,T,B extends ColumnDefBuilder<S,T,B>>

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.ColumnDefBuilder<S,T,B>
Type Parameters:
S - The type of the objects displayed in the rows of the table or grid.
T - The type of the values contained within the cells of this column.
B - The type of the builder itself.
Direct Known Subclasses:
ColumnDefGenericBuilder, ColumnDefTextBuilder
public abstract class ColumnDefBuilder<S,T,B extends ColumnDefBuilder<S,T,B>> extends Object
Base class for ColumnDef builders.

  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnDefBuilder

      protected ColumnDefBuilder(String name)
      Constructs a new instance of the ColumnDefBuilder class with the specified column name.
      Parameters:
      name - the text to be displayed as the header for the column

  • Method Details

    • self

      protected final B self()
      Returns the builder instance cast to the appropriate subclass type. This method enables method chaining in the builder pattern by ensuring that the methods in the subclass return the correct type.
      Returns:
      The builder instance cast to the type parameter B.

    • graphic

      public B graphic(@Nullable javafx.scene.Node graphic)
      Sets the graphic to be displayed alongside the column's text.
      Parameters:
      graphic - the Node to be used as the graphic, or null if no graphic is to be displayed
      Returns:
      this builder instance for chaining

    • editable

      public B editable(boolean editable)
      Sets whether the column is editable.
      Parameters:
      editable - true if the column should be editable, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance itself for method chaining

    • minWidth

      public B minWidth(double minWidth)
      Sets the minimum width for the column.
      Parameters:
      minWidth - the minimum width to set, in pixels
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • maxWidth

      public B maxWidth(double maxWidth)
      Sets the maximum width for the column.
      Parameters:
      maxWidth - The maximum width of the column in pixels. Must be a non-negative value.
      Returns:
      The builder instance for method chaining.

    • weight

      public B weight(double weight)
      Sets the weight of the column. The weight is used to determine how much space this column should take relative to other columns in layouts that support flexible column widths.
      Parameters:
      weight - the relative weight of the column; must be a non-negative value.
      Returns:
      the builder instance for chaining additional configuration methods.

    • resizable

      public B resizable(boolean resizable)
      Sets whether the column is resizable by the user.
      Parameters:
      resizable - true if the column should be resizable, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • valueGetter

      public B valueGetter(Function<S,T> valueGetter)
      Sets the function used to extract the value from an object of type S and assigns it to the cells of this column.
      Parameters:
      valueGetter - A Function that maps an object of type S to a value of type T.
      Returns:
      The builder instance for chaining further configuration.

    • valueSetter

      public B valueSetter(BiConsumer<S,T> valueSetter)
      Sets the value setter function for this column. The value setter is responsible for assigning a new value to the corresponding property of the row's backing object.
      Parameters:
      valueSetter - a BiConsumer that accepts the object representing a row and the new value to be set in the column
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • build

      public abstract ColumnDef<S,T> build()
      Constructs and returns a new instance of ColumnDef based on the configuration of the builder. This method finalizes the building process and encapsulates the column definition settings into a concrete implementation of ColumnDef.
      Returns:
      A new ColumnDef instance encapsulating the configured settings.
